items.name: Supply and installation of 100mm PIR insulation board

raw_ocr_text:
```
External Wrap Insulation
Personalized Proposal for Stephen Coreoran

Professional Management from Start to Finish
ENERGY-EFFICIENT | MAXIMIZE YOUR SEAGANTS

PROPOSAL FOR:
Stephen Coreoran
2023-09-27
G G Grove Park Avenue, Dublin 11, D11 C056
Estimate

INTRODUCTION
Thank you for considering us for your home energy upgrade. We are pleased to present the External Wrap Insulation proposal for your property.

STANDARD SPECIFICATION
- This is for a 100mm PIR insulation board
- Removable lead-in, internal and external D.P.C. (if applicable)
- New external render to all areas covered with new boards
- New silicone-based external render
- Individually tailored to suit your property’s specific needs
- All work is carried out by qualified and experienced tradespeople
- Scaffolding may be required (if applicable)

DETAILS IN SCOPE OF WORK
DESCRIPTION                     UNIT PRICE      TOTAL
Supply and installation of 100mm PIR insulation board   €2,200.00

PRICING & SUMMARY
Subtotal (ex-VAT)                     €2,200.00
Great Customer Rate (Inc. VAT @ 13.5%)   €2,490.00
Discount (as per Proposal Client)       -€1,000.00
Total Price Charged to Client!          €1,490.00

TERMS & CONDITIONS
- All works are covered by Employer Liability (EL) and Public Liability (PL)
- This proposal is valid for 30 days
- Any changes to the scope of work may result in additional costs
- Payment terms are subject to individual client needs

CLIENTS WE’VE HELPED
We are proud to have worked with a range of clients, featured in the press and media. Current projects include:

[Images of properties]

Trusted by our customers

60 - 79

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Great service, great people!

Graham
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I haven’t had the best experience with builders in the past, but this team really made it easy.”

All reviews can be found on Google.

GOOGLE REVIEW
“The transformation was incredible. Professional, clean, and the house looks amazing now. I highly recommend the team at External Wrap!”
```
